title: A Daughter of Two Worlds
writer: Edmund Goulding, Leroy Scott, James Young
actors: Norma Talmadge, Jack Crosby, Virginia Lee
plot: When Jennie Malone is accused of forgery, her father Black Jerry, the proprietor of an underworld dive, realizes that his daughter deserves a better living environment. With the aid of her Uncle George, he arranges for Jennie to a...
